_comment: Minimal, valid starting config: one Telegram channel (polling) routed to one LOCAL Ollama brain, zero cloud. sensitivity=private keeps dispatch local-only. The bot token resolves from the env var NAMED here (export TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=...; never inline the value). Validate it with `korvun config check korvun.example.json`, then run with `korvun serve --config korvun.example.json`. See docs/CONFIGURATION.md for every field and the configs/ profiles for edge/cloud variants.
